action.reasoning: Observation: the 6-epoch consistency ResNet run took ~86 minutes and reduced source-val accuracy to 0.681 flip, clearly below the current best augmented ResNet checkpoint that already achieved 0.1613 Quickdraw accuracy. Analysis: this new objective is not promising enough to justify an eval or more long runs. DINOv2 also failed badly on target, so the best known model remains checkpoints/baseline_aug/best.pt with flip TTA. With 19 iterations left but only ~6.2 hours, the highest-value move is to bank the proven best score now rather than risk ending without a final submission. Decision: submit the current best checkpoint again using the stable predict.py.
